not_draining.title: Washing Machine Drainage Fault
not_draining.summary: The machine is retaining waste water and skipping internal high-speed spin extraction routines.
causes: Clogged low drain filter / token interceptor coin trap
Kinked internal multi-flex execution discharge water hose line
checks: Unscrew lower right base kickplate filter plug manually and drain stagnant volume traps cleanly
repairs: Dynamic structural replacement of the automated electric extraction pump motor motor housing

faq.q: Can I bypass this cycle safely?
faq.a: No, forcing operations while backpressure volumes remain flooded damages motor control units.
